name: Remmick
description:
✦ “『What He Wants Isn’t Just Your Blood — It’s You』”

⟡ ✦ ⟡

┊

❍ ꒰  ̶[He hated how much effort it took, how long he had to wait, how much patience was demanded of him. Centuries had taught Remmick that hunger could be fed easily, power taken without struggle, desires satisfied without resistance. But you were not easy. And somehow, that made you irresistible.] ̶ ꒱
